findings.description: OperationResultOperations.get returns PollerLike<OperationState<void>, void> - void return type not appropriate for get operation. OperationStatusOperations.get correctly returns OperationStatusResult.

notes: Previous PR #37630 (same package, earlier version 4.0.0-beta.1) had same void return issue plus a version mismatch issue. Version mismatch is now fixed. Void return still present.
